mappings.rationaleAI: The biological sciences are the disciplines devoted to the systematic study of life.
The biological sciences are a major branch of natural science.
Biology is the direct subject of this section covering the biological sciences as an academic discipline.
Darwin's work transformed the biological sciences into a coherent discipline grounded in evolutionary theory.
Pasteur's germ theory of disease and work on vaccination revolutionized the biological sciences and microbiology.
Evolutionary theory is a unifying framework of the biological sciences surveyed here.
Genetics is a major discipline within the biological sciences surveyed here.
Paleontology is a discipline bridging geology and the biological sciences.
Taxonomy is a foundational discipline of the biological sciences surveyed here.
Zoology is a major branch of the biological sciences surveyed in this section.
Botany is a major branch of the biological sciences surveyed in this section.
Anatomy is a foundational discipline of the biological sciences.
Physiology is a major discipline within the biological sciences surveyed here.
Biochemistry is a key discipline within the biological sciences surveyed in this section.
Biotechnology applies biological sciences to practical problems.
The microscope revolutionized the biological sciences by revealing cellular life.
